session.user:
Run the following tests and report results. Do NOT fix any errors — just report:
1. pytest tests/unit/cli/test_config_codespace.py -v 2. pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/test_resolve.py -v 3. pytest tests/unit/core/codespace/test_codespace_run.py -v 4. pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/test_connect_cmd.py -v 5. pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/run/objective/test_plan_cmd.py -v 6. pytest tests/unit/cli/test_config_docs_path.py -v
Run all 6 test files in a single pytest command if possible. Report full output.
session.assistant: I'll run all 6 test files in a single pytest command to report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run 6 pytest test files with verbose output
